hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qv 'sw\.js' || exit 0; CURRENT=$(sed -n 's/.*osaka-travel-v\([0-9]*\).*/\1/p' /home/user/Osaka-Travel/sw.js | head -1); [ -z "$CURRENT" ] && exit 0; NEXT=$((CURRENT + 1)); sed -i "s/osaka-travel-v${CURRENT}/osaka-travel-v${NEXT}/" /home/user/Osaka-Travel/sw.js 2>/dev/null || true
